name: Sweet Yogurt Topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Push the raspberries through a fine sieve into a bowl to make 1/4 cup puree.
2. Gently stir in the honey and vanilla.
3. Stir in the yogurt.
You could use any fruit puree (either homemade or commercially made) and reduce the honey if this is too sweet.
CAUTION: If you overmix strained yogurt, it will become thin.
Yield: 1 1/2 cups
Serving Size: 2 Tablespoons
